---
title: "Neuralt netværk til regression app"
---

Herunder gives en gennemgang af hver af fanerne i [Neuralt Netværk til Regression App](https://apps01.math.aau.dk/ai/nn-regression/){target="_blank"}. Du kan læse mere om matematikken bag i [noten om simple kunstige neurale netværk til regression](/noter/simple_neurale_net_regression/simple_neurale_net_regression.qmd){target="_blank"}.


<!-- ## <span class="toggle-icon">Data</span> {.collapsible} -->


## [Data]{.toggle-icon} {.collapsible}


::: {.collapse-content}

{{< include data.qmd >}}

{{< include next.qmd >}}


:::


## [Variable]{.toggle-icon} {.collapsible}

::: {.collapse-content}

{{< include target-variabel.qmd >}}

{{< include feature-variable.qmd >}}

{{< include next.qmd >}}

:::


## [Træning]{.toggle-icon} {.collapsible}

::: {.collapse-content}

{{< include skjulte_lag1.qmd >}}

{{< include skjulte_lag2.qmd >}}

{{< include learning_rate.qmd >}}

{{< include antal_iterationer.qmd >}}

{{< include aktiveringsfunktion.qmd >}}

{{< include indstillinger-nn.qmd >}}

{{< include train.qmd >}}

{{< include output_tabsfkt.qmd >}}


:::


## [Evaluering & Prædiktion]{.toggle-icon} {.collapsible}

::: {.collapse-content}

{{< include eval_pred_regression.qmd >}} 

:::
